violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Damaged pizza prep cooler. Loose screws/lids. Missing trim. Needs repair.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Seal damaged/exposed parts of particle board shelving/cabinets in kitchen area.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Soda dispensing equipment has build-up of syrups and needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets/shelving in kitchen area have a build-up of food/debris and need cleaning.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Wash water and rinse water for three compartment sink were not clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have debris build-up and need cleaning under equipment and shelving units in all areas of facility.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Soda bag box nozzles need cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Kitchen equipment needs detail cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed to cabinets/shelving in kitchen and storage areas.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in walk in units, dry storage, and in kitchen. Clean under shelving units and equipment.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
